title: Shy
description: Lets you hide entities when you get close to them. Very configurable!
body: # For 1.21+ check out https://modrinth.com/mod/transparent-entities # Shy Lets you hide entities when you get close to them. Very configurable! Options include: - Master Toggle - Ignore Mobs - Ignore NPCs - Ignore Armor Stands - Distance Slider (0 to 10) ### Discord My Discord - https://discord.gg/rejfv9kFJj ### Notes This mod uses OneConfig for its config. OneConfig will automatically be downloaded on launch if it is not already installed. ### Modpack? If you want to use my mods in a Modpack, I ask that the modpack is only available on Modrinth. Feel free to reach out to me if you would like to discuss further.
